pages.text: The $(item:magic_storage:storage_core) is the heart of every Magic Storage network. It holds all stored item data, tracks connected blocks, and manages energy pools.$(br2)$(thing)One Core per network only.$()

The Core $(thing)tile entity$() stores all items inserted into the network. Items are tracked as $(thing)ItemKey$() entries - each unique item (different NBT = different type) gets its own slot with unlimited capacity.$(br2)The Core also holds $(l:magic_storage:energy_overview)energy pools$() for powered crafting.

$(thing)Breaking the Core:$() The block entity is destroyed when the Core block is broken. All $(thing)stored items are lost$() - be careful! Consider using a Silk Touch tool or relocating network blocks before moving a Core.$(br2)$(thing)Strength:$() 3.0 | $(thing)Blast Resistance:$() 6.0$(br)$(thing)Requires correct tool$() for drops.
